channel.title: Mann Ki Baat Hindi
channel.description: Unofficial Hindi podcast feed for Mann Ki Baat
channel.itunes:author: PMO India
channel.itunes:summary: Hindi editions of Mann Ki Baat

item.title: PM Narendra Modi's Mann Ki Baat with Nation | Mann ki Baat 106th Episode Live Broadcast
item.description:
During ‘Mann Ki Baat’ address, Prime Minister Modi drew attention to the notable rise in Khadi sales and underscored the significance of endorsing the ‘Vocal for Local’ initiative. Additionally, he spoke about ‘MYBharat,’ a youth-focused organisation. PM Modi commended India’s achievements in the Para Asian Games and Special Olympics and offered heartfelt tributes to Sardar Patel, tribal leaders, and Mirabai.
#mannkibaat #pmmodimannkibaat #pmmodi
To Subscribe PM Narendra Modi's YouTube Channel click now at https://goo.gl/8qsb5E and stay updated🔔
To Follow PM Narendra Modi's WhatsApp Channel, click now at https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va8IaebCMY0C8oOkQT1F 🔔
